hero.question: Capitals vs. Penguins
hero.prob_take: At 57.5%, the market is saying Capitals are slight favorites but the 12-point surge in 24 hours suggests sharp money just arrived with real conviction on Washington, not casual tilt. The move reeks of late injury intel or lineup news the general public hasn't priced in yet, so if you're betting NO you're racing the clock to fade before more pros load up.

daily_take.headline: Capitals surged 12 points in 24 hours. The market is pricing in something.
daily_take.deck: Capitals-Penguins odds jumped to 57.5% on $960K volume, suggesting sharp money just positioned ahead of game time. A 12-point swing that big, that fast, doesn't happen on narrative alone. Check injury reports and line movement at the sportsbooks. If the sharps are already in, retail is chasing. Smart play: wait for live odds to compress before entering, or fade the momentum entirely if you spot a reason the public is wrong.
